title: Bill for the Public Land Transport Am Act No. of 2025
text:
REPUBLIC OF VANUATU
BILL FOR THE
PUBLIC LAND TRANSPORT (AMENDMENT)
ACT NO. OF 2025
Explanatory Note
This Bill amends the Public Land Transport Act No. 4 of 2015(“the Act”).
Currently, the Public Land Transport Authority Board includes individuals who also operate transport
businesses, creating significant conflicts of interest. This Bill reduces the composition of the Board
from 10 members to 6, comprising senior government officials without direct financial interests in
the sector with only one representative from the Provincial Associations.
With this amendment, the new composition of the Board are as follows:
• Director of the Department of Local Authorities (Chairperson)
• Director of the Department of Tourism
• Director of Public Works
• Head of the Vanuatu Police Traffic Unit
• A representative nominated by the Minister of Internal Affairs
• Representative of Provincial Land Transport Associations
This change will reduce costs associated with board meetings and improve impartiality in decision-
making and ensure Public Land Transport Authority oversee the proper management of land transport
associations.
Minister of Internal Affairs
REPUBLIC OF VANUATU
BILL FOR THE
PUBLIC LAND TRANSPORT (AMENDMENT)
ACT NO. OF 2025
Arrangement of Sections
1 Amendment ................................................................................................ 2
2 Commencement .......................................................................................... 2
Bill for the Public Land Transport (Amendment) Act No. of 2025 1
REPUBLIC OF VANUATU
BILL FOR THE
PUBLIC LAND TRANSPORT (AMENDMENT)
ACT NO. OF 2025
An Act to amend the Public Land Transport Act No. 4 of 2015.
Be it enacted by the President and Parliament as follows-
1 Amendment
The Public Land Transport Act No. 4 of 2015 is amended as set out in the
Schedule.
2 Commencement
This Act commences on the day on which it is published in the Gazette.
Bill for the Public Land Transport (Amendment) Act No. of 2025 2
SCHEDULE
AMENDMENTS OF PUBLIC LAND TRANSPORT ACT NO. 4 OF 2015
SCHEDULE
AMENDMENTS OF PUBLIC LAND TRANSPORT ACT
NO. 4 OF 2015
1 After paragraph 2(3)(b)
Insert
“(ba) Director of Department of Public Works; and”
2 Paragraph 2(3)(e)
Repeal the paragraph, substitute
“(e) a representative of the Provincial Land Transport Associations
nominated and approved by all the Provincial Land Transport
Associations.”
3 After subsection 2(3)
Insert
“(4) To avoid doubt, the representative under paragraph (3)(e) is 1 person who
is to represent all the Provincial Land Transport Associations.”
4 Paragraph 8(3)(b)
Delete “7”, substitute “4”
Bill for the Public Land Transport (Amendment) Act No. of 2025 3
authority: Parliament of the Republic of Vanuatu
